recommended_hook: Orrin Labs has no named AI/ML leadership role. CTO holds a combined infrastructure-and-data remit per the public team page. Public signals currently point to public company homepage appears blocked or inaccessible without login.

gap_findings.title: Dedicated MLOps / ML-platform engineering function (roles open 45+ days suggests active buildout)
gap_findings.description: Orrin Labs has Data Platform Engineer roles open but no explicitly MLOps-labeled roles. The distinction may be deliberate (integrated in data-platform role) or a gap. Current hiring signal: Public company homepage appears blocked or inaccessible without login.

gap_findings.title: Public technical commentary on agentic or evaluation-framework work
gap_findings.description: Orrin Labs blog mentions AI as a priority but has no technical depth posts on agentic workflows or evaluation in the last 12 months. Funding and AI readiness signals currently read as low and score 0/3.
